# Play Page Plan

1. Add test-first helpers for play-character lookup, prompt composition, world-state shaping, and NPC turn-cap logic.
2. Implement server play page entrypoint with character validation, world bootstrap, host opening generation, and NPC reply server action.
3. Implement client play-page components for world polling, splat rendering, reader transcript, NPC sprites, and NPC chat.
4. Run the full verification gate and keep changes confined to Sleuth files.
